title: taraxacum infucatulum
intro: Taraxacum infucatulum is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus, known for its yellow flowers and edible leaves. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation due to its high content of sesquiterpene lactones and flavonoids. The health benefits of Taraxacum infucatulum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being consumed raw or cooked, offering a natural and holistic approach to health and wellness.
